turns.subject: Context: Series B closed January 2026
turns.body:
Sam,

StreamlineOps has doubled open engineering roles since January's Series B, seeking Kafka and Spark skills.

Companies in your position often struggle to find experienced data engineers immediately available.

Tenacious provides pre-vetted Kafka and Spark experts who can start contributing within a week.

How are you currently addressing the talent demand to meet your roadmap?

Birkity
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
grounding_facts: StreamlineOps has more than doubled open engineering postings in the last 60 days
urgent demand for Kafka and Spark engineers

interpretation.reasoning: The prospect explicitly stated "nope I dont need that", indicating they are not interested in our services.
grounding_facts_used: StreamlineOps has doubled open engineering roles since January's Series B, seeking Kafka and Spark skills.
